name: PPM Development
description: Comprehensive pre-production meeting decks that align creative vision with production reality.

name: Script Breakdown
description: Detailed script analysis — elements, talent, locations, props, and scheduling requirements.

name: Call Sheets
description: Professional call sheets with accurate timing, crew contacts, and set protocols.

name: Production Scheduling
description: Multi-day shoot scheduling optimized for talent availability, locations, and budget.

name: Shot Lists
description: Director-aligned shot lists with storyboard references and priority sequencing.

name: Talent Coordination
description: End-to-end talent management — contracts, call times, hospitality, and clearance.

name: Director Support
description: On-set assistance ensuring the director's creative flow is never interrupted by logistics.

name: Client Communication
description: Clear, professional liaison between brand teams, agencies, and production crew.

name: On-set Execution
description: Real-time problem solving, crew coordination, and continuity management during shoots.

name: Post Production
description: Edit supervision, grade reviews, and delivery management through final output.
